PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8080' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Frontend: OK \(Status $\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "Frontend: FAILED - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3001' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Backend: OK \(Status $\($r2.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "Backend: FAILED - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3001/api/health' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Backend health: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "Backend health check: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
